title: Hypixel Skyblock Tweaks
description: For an efficient and lightweight Hypixel Skyblock, we offer a range of performance enhancements and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
## Our modpack for Hypixel Skyblock is a curated collection of mods designed to enhance the gameplay experience on Hypixel Skyblock. 
These mods can include quality-of-life improvements such as better inventory management, custom GUI enhancements, and performance optimizations. Additionally, they often feature tools for tracking in-game statistics, automating repetitive tasks, and providing detailed information about items and mobs. Such a modpack is incredibly useful for players as it streamlines many aspects of the game, allowing them to focus more on strategy and progression rather than micromanagement. By integrating these mods, players can enjoy a more efficient and enjoyable gaming experience on Hypixel Skyblock.
#
# Our Mods
**Skyblock Utils**
> Skyblock utils currently hovers around kuudra related features.

![Neu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c06440db9192b6e0dae1ba8fd166b04da112b5bc_0.webp)

**NEU**
> NEU, or Not Enough Updates, is a mod for Hypixel Skyblock that provides detailed item information, custom GUI elements, and various quality-of-life improvements. It helps players manage resources and strategize more effectively by offering in-depth insights into their items and gameplay.

![optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53b01d34bb3bb9dc362718cb8f62c1138cb7e42.jpeg)

**Optifine**
> OptiFine is a Minecraft optimization mod.
It allows Minecraft to run faster and look better with full support for HD textures and many configuration options.

 > _**[This Mod MUST BE INSTALLED MANUALLY](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar&x=8f44)**_
